# Examples

Real output produced by the `repospec` CLI, committed as living documentation and
fixtures.

## `demo-service/`

Generated with:

```bash
repospec init --yes \
  --name demo-service \
  --description "An example service generated by repospec init." \
  --type service \
  --languages typescript \
  --adapters claude,agents
```

It shows the full result of `repospec init`:

- `.repospec/` — the human-owned source of truth (`project.yaml`, the three prose
  documents, starter agents and rules).
- `CLAUDE.md` and `AGENTS.md` — Repospec-owned generated entrypoints, each carrying
  the managed header that protects them from being clobbered (ADR-0004).

Edit `.repospec/` and run `repospec sync` to regenerate the entrypoints.
